title.rendered: Shaping Beliefs and Driving Organizational Success

content.rendered: In this insightful episode of “Marketing In The Now,” host David Reske welcomes Jasmine Martirossian, Chief Strategy and Marketing Officer at Strategy Ark. With a rich background in leading transformative projects across various industries, Jasmine shares profound insights into how actionable steps rather than mere belief systems can significantly influence organizational success. The discussion delves into the social psychology behind why actions often precede and shape beliefs, highlighting the importance of initiating small, practical steps that lead to visible success. Jasmine and David explore effective strategies like embedding mission and value statements into daily operations, leveraging strength-based leadership, and ensuring continuous feedback and accountability within teams. Tune in to learn how to create a virtuous cycle of improvement and engagement in your organization, driving change through action and reinforcing a culture of success and innovation
